news.title:
Shriram Overseas Investments seeks RBI license to act as primary dealer, boosting Shriram Finance's market presence.
This initiative may improve liquidity management and trading capabilities for Shriram Finance.
news.summary:
Shriram Overseas Investments seeks RBI license to act as primary dealer, boosting Shriram Finance's market presence.
This initiative may improve liquidity management and trading capabilities for Shriram Finance.

news.title:
Shriram Finance divested 81.63% stake in Bharath Investments, ceasing its subsidiary status.
Armour Insurance Services also ceased as an associate due to Bharath's divestment.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance divested 81.63% stake in Bharath Investments, ceasing its subsidiary status.
Armour Insurance Services also ceased as an associate due to Bharath's divestment.

news.title:
RBI may plug regulatory gaps affecting NBFCs like Bajaj Finance and Shriram Finance.
Both stocks fell; Bajaj Finance down 4.5% to ₹897, Shriram Finance down 2.6% to ₹1,034.9.
news.summary:
RBI may plug regulatory gaps affecting NBFCs like Bajaj Finance and Shriram Finance.
Both stocks fell; Bajaj Finance down 4.5% to ₹897, Shriram Finance down 2.6% to ₹1,034.9.

news.title: Shriram Finance tops Nifty gainers, rising over 5%.
news.summary: Shriram Finance tops Nifty gainers, rising over 5%.

news.title:
Shriram Finance opened trading on 09 Mar 2026 with a gap down, 3.8 lower.
The drop reflects market concerns in the NBFC sector.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance opened trading on 09 Mar 2026 with a gap down, 3.8 lower.

news.title: Shriram Finance executed a block trade of Rs.138.9 cr for 1,358,864 shares at Rs.1022/share.
news.summary: Shriram Finance executed a block trade of Rs.138.9 cr for 1,358,864 shares at Rs.1022/share.

news.title:
DEG and Citi provided $76M financing to Shriram Finance for MSMEs, EVs, and rural lending, promoting economic inclusion.
DEG loan focuses on MSMEs, women borrowers; Citi's ₹260 crore loan aids smallholder farmers, aligning with UN SDGs.
news.summary:
DEG and Citi provided $76M financing to Shriram Finance for MSMEs, EVs, and rural lending, promoting economic inclusion.
DEG loan focuses on MSMEs, women borrowers; Citi's ₹260 crore loan aids smallholder farmers, aligning with UN SDGs.

news.title:
Shriram Finance confirms timely interest payment of Rs. 2,854.9 lakhs on NCDs due 02-03-2026.
ISIN: INE721A07SF1; Issue size Rs. 65,000 lakhs; Record date 15-02-2026; Frequency: Yearly.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance confirms timely interest payment of Rs. 2,854.9 lakhs on NCDs due 02-03-2026.
ISIN: INE721A07SF1; Issue size Rs. 65,000 lakhs; Record date 15-02-2026; Frequency: Yearly.

news.title:
Q3FY26 shows strong NBFC growth with improved portfolio quality.
Lower bond yields reduce financing costs, driving margin expansion for NBFCs.
news.summary:
Q3FY26 shows strong NBFC growth with improved portfolio quality.
Lower bond yields reduce financing costs, driving margin expansion for NBFCs.

news.title:
Shriram Finance confirms timely payment of Rs. 1,113.7 lakhs interest and Rs. 3,860 lakhs principal for its NCDs.
The interest and redemption payments were made on February 23, 2026, as per scheduled due dates.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance confirms timely payment of Rs. 1,113.7 lakhs interest and Rs. 3,860 lakhs principal for its NCDs.
The interest and redemption payments were made on February 23, 2026, as per scheduled due dates.

news.title:
Shriram Finance sees 12.3% rise in open interest, indicating market sentiment shift.
Robust volume activity suggests increased investor interest and directional bets on stock.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance sees 12.3% rise in open interest, indicating market sentiment shift.
Robust volume activity suggests increased investor interest and directional bets on stock.

news.title:
Shriram Finance's super app, 'Shriram One,' powered by Microsoft Azure, serves 20M users.
63% of app users are from small towns/rural areas, integrating lending, deposits, and payments.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance's super app, 'Shriram One,' powered by Microsoft Azure, serves 20M users.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.

news.title:
Shriram Finance receives RBI nod for MUFG's 20% stake acquisition worth ₹39,620 crore.
MUFG to nominate 2 directors; Shriram plans to boost new vehicle loans to 15% from 10%.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance receives RBI nod for MUFG's 20% stake acquisition worth ₹39,620 crore.
MUFG to nominate 2 directors; Shriram plans to boost new vehicle loans to 15% from 10%.

news.title:
Shriram Finance updates on its proposed issuance of 47.11 crore equity shares to MUFG Bank via preferential issue.
RBI confirmed no prior approval is needed; other approvals are awaited, updates to follow.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance updates on its proposed issuance of 47.11 crore equity shares to MUFG Bank via preferential issue.

Shriram Finance received in-principle approval from BSE and NSE for issuing 47.11 crore equity shares.
Shares, priced at Rs. 840.93 each, will be issued via preferential placement to MUFG Bank Ltd.

news.title:
Shriram Finance Ltd surged 5.4% intraday, hitting a 52-week high of Rs 1,044.4.
The stock rose 8.5% from prior levels, outperforming its sector and benchmark indices.

Shriram Finance shares fell 5.3%, hitting a day low of Rs 943.95 on BSE.
The decline followed a GST penalty order issued by the Chennai tax department.
